title: What is dwell time, and why does it predict sales? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: Dwell time is how long a customer stays, and it predicts spending better than almost any other retail metric. Here's what the research says about using music to control it, and when longer isn't better.

schema.headline: What is dwell time, and why does it predict sales?
schema.description: Dwell time predicts retail spending. How music controls it, and when longer dwell signals frustration instead of interest.
